title: Butterfly Effect
description: A lightweight yet plentiful modpack combining the feel of beta Minecraft with modern features and mods. Create included!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13250245f64d69ef408e4df84f0307dba973e9d5_0.webp)
Interested in supporting me and the development of my modpacks? BisectHosting is the perfect solution. New customers can use the "doog" to get a 25% discount on their first month of a gaming server. With 24/7 support and fast response times, you can expect top-notch service for all your gaming needs.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3616167b8020b1809b5ace9918037744710a9964_0.webp)
**The Butterfly Effect** is the sensitive dependence on initial conditions in which a small change in one state of a deterministic nonlinear system can result in large differences in a later state, according to Wikipedia anyways. To put it in nerd talk, one tiny change in the past can make a huge change for the future. Which is the premise of this pack: _what if the past held changes that took the development of Minecraft down a different road?_ By combining the aesthetic and simplicity of older Minecraft with modern-day features and even some big mods, they make up the ultimate successor to packs like Better Than Adventure and Mangopack. Whether you just want the old world generation and textures, or want some crazy terrain to build your next Create contraption with, there's something here for anyone, regardless of how long you've played.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19778589d50c9284fd7063918c3112e84342ea8b_0.webp)
You can find a more fleshed-out list of features in the Gallery tab of this pack. If you'd rather read it:
- Beta-inspired world generation, textures, and gameplay changes with Cascades, Nostalgic Tweaks, and Golden Days.
- Modern-day features up to 1.21.9 with Copper Age Backport and Vanilla Backport.
- A new heavenly dimension integrated to the game called the Aether.
- New ways to innovate your world and engineer amazing contraptions with Create.
- Bring your builds to life with Bits and Chisels, ReFramed, Additional Banners, Sawmill and Head Index.
- New tools to aid in exploration with Spyglass Zoom, Map Atlases, Nature's Compass, Waystones, and Port-A-Chest.
- New potions and enchants with Spirit Walker, Vein Mining, Aether Affinity and Miner's Enchant.
- 4 new seasons that change every 30 days; spring, summer, fall, and winter.
- Protect your base with Brazier multiblock structures.
- Lots of QoL additions to add on to the 1.20.1 version platform.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5fb8a446f9934f6e940a4cfa0887f7a27c5818_0.webp)
This modpack is my current passion project, so I plan to work on it a lot in the future and keep updating it. Some ideas on the table so far:
- **PRIORITY:** Item name parity, custom textures for items without programmer art textures.
- New dimensions: Twilight Forest, 20w14~ Infinite Dimension mechanic.
- More decoration mods: stained blocks, furniture.
- New hostile and passive mobs.
- New surface, cave, Nether and End biomes.
